text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a veritable maelstrom of fervor and
excitement, the curtain falls on the Twinkle Star
Climax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the spectators are celebrating the emergence
of the greatest Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>! I'm sorry
we didn't get the chance to speak properly for a
while!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I was completely swamped with my duties... But
things have settled down for the moment, so I
thought I'd come and see you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for all your hard work!
choice_data_list: Thank you, Reporter Otonashi. You've had your nose to the grindstone too.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Oh, think nothing of it!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Without your cooperation, Trainer
<username>, the race series
would never have flourished like it did!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Your partner's efforts, your granting me the
opportunity to write that report, and your
participation in the races themselves...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Star Climax simply wouldn't have
been possible without all your contributions.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I just want you to know how much I appreciate
everything!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
The reality has finally sunk in... The greatest
Umamusume has been crowned.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: It's really happened...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Maybe so. It's a strange feeling to finally
accomplish what you've always dreamed of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, Reporter Otonashi looks out over
the now-empty track with a vaguely melancholy
expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hey, Mom! Wasn't that race amazing?!

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text: It really was! They were all very cool.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I want to be the greatest Umamusume someday
too!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
choice_data_list: Looks like the competition is far from over.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're right... It will go on for as long as
there are Umamusume who strive for greatness!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! The Climax was such a grand
success that I'd better start planning for the next
one!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: I am! I'll keep striving onward as a reporter so by the time that young Umamusume is old enough to compete, the Climax will be even better!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Now, as my first step on the road to the second
Climax, it's time to interview a distinguished
contributor! How are you feeling right now?!
choice_data_list: I'm raring to win the next one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Climax might be over, but the dream I share
with <chrname> lives on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, we make a firm vow to fully support
each other as we continue down this path!
